new_value: {"notes":"Completed in 8e62f5cbc. Updated Python public contracts and frame docs for Schnorr-48-in-MIC semantics; made RxFrame satisfy exported RxResult via read-only forwarding properties; added independent receive assertions for intact payload/MIC and flattened metadata. Validation: 306 link/vector/interop tests passed with 11 skips; focused 96 passed with 8 skips; Ruff and targeted mypy clean; three final current-marker reviews found no issues."}
